summary: Trust Explanation UI testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED (trust-history endpoint + regression). Frontend: All Trust History UI elements verified - trust-history-section, trust-history-summary with Hebrew deterministic line, 10 trust-history-items with Hebrew source labels (דעיכה יומית, נקודת שדה, עדכון ידני), value/risk deltas with correct green/red colors, proper section ordering.
critical_code_review_comments: TrustHistorySection component correctly implements Hebrew source labels (SOURCE_LABELS mapping)
Value deltas render green (#22c55e) when positive, red (#ef4444) when negative
Risk deltas render correctly with appropriate colors
Deterministic summary line via buildSummaryLine() works - shows 'עדכון ידני (5) היא המקור המרכזי לאמון השדה הנוכחי לצד דעיכה טבעית.'
Section ordering correct: field-trust-block → trust-history-section → profile-direction-bar
Parallel API fetches working: profile/record (5s AI) + trust-history (fast) loaded simultaneously
Compact design maintained - summary element height ~37px, non-gamified appearance
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with ~12 ledger entries from previous test iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Explanation UI fully verified. New TrustHistorySection component renders on profile page between field-trust-block and direction-bar. Verifies: data-testid='trust-history-section' present, data-testid='trust-history-summary' shows deterministic Hebrew line, data-testid='trust-history-item' (10 items), data-testid='trust-history-item-source' with Hebrew labels, data-testid='trust-history-item-value-delta' (green/red), data-testid='trust-history-item-risk-delta'. Existing UI elements (field-trust-block, ai-profile-interpretation) remain functional.

verified_frontend_elements.trust-history-summary: ✓ Found - 'עדכון ידני (5) היא המקור המרכזי לאמון השדה הנוכחי לצד דעיכה טבעית.'
verified_frontend_elements.trust-history-item-source: ✓ Hebrew labels: דעיכה יומית (3), נקודת שדה (2), עדכון ידני (5)
verified_frontend_elements.trust-history-item-value-delta: ✓ Found 7 elements with correct colors (green positive, red negative)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database reads/writes
